brand_identity.name: FuelPro Rewards
brand_identity.tagline: Every gallon earns. Every visit rewards.
brand_identity.archetype: Premium Hybrid (Dark Luxury Mobile + Clean Light SaaS)

rules.headers: Use font-weight 800 with -0.5px letter spacing (tracking-tighter) for premium feel

spacing.mobile: p-4 to p-6 for inner containers, gap-4 to gap-6
spacing.admin: p-6 to p-8 for cards, gap-6 to gap-8

points_card.style: Glassmorphism with deep navy gradient to gold edge. Inner shadow for depth. Glowing border.
points_card.tailwind_classes: bg-gradient-to-br from-[#112240] to-[#0A1628] border border-[#F5A623]/30 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(245,166,35,0.15)] rounded-3xl p-6 relative overflow-hidden

coupon_card.style: Mobile horizontal list view, dark surface (#112240) with subtle red/gold accent tag.

reward_detail.style: Full-screen QR focus with frosted glass overlay (backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0A1628]/80) and a glowing countdown timer.

kpi_card.style: Minimalist white card on light gray background. 1px border. Sparklines for trends.
kpi_card.tailwind_classes: bg-white rounded-2xl border border-[#8899AA]/20 p-6 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow

drawer_form.style: Right-side slide-out (Shadcn Sheet) for Coupon CRUD and Customer details. Clean white with Navy text.

promotions_calendar.style: Customized Shadcn Calendar taking full width of its grid section, highlighting dates with primary Navy/Gold indicator dots.

scanner.layout: 60% left camera stream, 40% right results panel in landscape mode.
scanner.feedback: Success flashes Green (#22C55E), Error flashes Red (#E8132A) across the camera overlay. Animated pulsing scan frame.

motion_and_interactions.tier_progress_ring: Framer Motion animated SVG circle path drawing from 0 to current progress. Ease-out-cubic.
motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Fade and slight slide-up (y: 10 to y: 0) on mount for the mobile app.
motion_and_interactions.scanner_frame: Pulsing border opacity for scanning state.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Subtle brightness shifts rather than stark color changes for dark mode elements.

slide_1.description: Happy driver showing joy of rewards, placed as background with dark gradient overlay (bg-gradient-to-t from-[#0A1628] via-[#0A1628]/80 to-transparent)

slide_2.description: Convenience store snacks and coffee, dark gradient overlay.

slide_3.description: Premium gas station at night, dark gradient overlay for deep contrast.

iconography.style: Customer side: Accent colored icons (Gold/Red). Admin side: Muted Gray icons for inactive, Navy for active.

testing.attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button', data-testid='reward-card-gold').

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the frontend in React using Tailwind CSS and Shadcn UI.
Use Framer Motion for smooth micro-interactions (especially the tier progress ring and active:scale-[0.97]).
Maintain strict separation of context: mobile layouts for Customer, responsive/desktop layouts for Admin, landscape tablet layout for Scanner.
Do not use generic HTML inputs, use customized Shadcn form primitives.
Ensure the hero points card in the customer app looks highly premium with the specified #F5A623 glow and #112240 base.
All headers must use Inter font with font-weight 800 and tight tracking as requested by the user.
Data components on Admin must include Recharts for sparklines, line charts, and donut charts.
